series_metadata.series_description: These records include original treatment documentation, rehabilitation plans, intake forms, progress notes, closure reports and correspondence with managed care organizations and documentation from case managers.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in BWC storage facility discharge, microfilm ; Microform: microfilm 20 years in off-site storage ; Electronic: audited by auditor of State and audit report is released, audit resolutions issued or resolved, or no longer of administrative value
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Burn ; Electronic: Delete
